title: Thai Grilled Cheese Tapas
description: A creamy twist on traditional grilled cheese, inspired by Thai flavors and perfect for tapas platters.

ingredients.name: Tapas spread
ingredients.notes: a combination of cream cheese, chutney, and chopped fresh herbs

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Butter one side of each bread slice.
Place one slice of bread, buttered side down, in the grill or grill pan.
Top with a slice of Gruyere cheese, a spoonful of tapas spread, and a sprinkle of Thai red chili flakes.
Place the second slice of bread, buttered side up, on top of the filling.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the bread is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
Flip the sandwich over and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the other side is also golden brown.
Repeat with the remaining ingredients to make 4-6 tapas grilled cheese.
Serve immediately, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro and a lime wedge.
